reasoning: Fidelity composite critically low: 0.40 (3/3 dimensions evaluated). Document quality below minimum threshold for publication.

concerns.analysis: The output document is missing several entire pages from the presentation portion of the source PDF. Specifically, Page 5 (Title slide), Page 6 (Campaign Overview), Page 7 (Campaign Metrics), Page 9 (Campaign Airings), Page 14 (URLs Accessed), and Page 15 (Reach and Analytics) are absent. The JSON explicitly contains a placeholder indicating that 6 sections were omitted due to token budget, which confirms the absence of substantial content from the source.
concerns.source_pdf_quote: Presentation pages 5 (Title), 6 (Campaign Overview), 7 (Spectrum Reach Campaign metrics), 9 (Campaign Airings), 14 (URLs Accessed), and 15 (Reach and Analytics).

concerns.analysis: The table 'Zone Cities and Zips' on page 8 (reading_order 49) has significant row alignment and data corruption issues. Row 6 erroneously repeats '27508 | Bunn' in both halves of the row, whereas the source has '27508 | Bunn | 27553 | Manson'. Subsequent rows (e.g., Row 7) are misaligned as a result, pairing data from different horizontal lines in the source.
concerns.source_pdf_quote: Table on Page 8: Row 6 (27508 Bunn | 27553 Manson); Row 7 (27509 Butner | 27803 Rocky Mount).
concerns.output_quote: reading_order 49: Row 6 (27508 | Bunn | 27508 | Bunn); Row 7 (27509 | Butner | 27553 | Manson).

concerns.analysis: Multiple meaningful images and data visualizations from the source PDF are missing in the HTML output. Specifically, the map on page 8 (Durham Zone), the collage of network logos on page 9 (Campaign Airings), the line graph and pie chart on page 10 (Webpage Analytics), the bar chart on page 11 (Engagement), and the pie chart on page 12 (New Visitor vs Returning) are all absent. These are meaningful content items that convey data and context not fully captured by the remaining text.
concerns.source_pdf_quote: Meaningful images/charts on pages 8 (Map), 9 (Logo collage), 10 (Line graph, Pie chart), 11 (Bar chart), and 12 (Pie chart).
concerns.output_quote: The corresponding HTML sections for these slides (e.g., 'Durham (RLDU) Zone - 0664', 'Campaign Airings', 'Webpage Analytics: Site Summary') contain only text and tables, with the graphical visualizations completely omitted.
concerns.location: Throughout the presentation slides section (starting at 'DRAFT - Recruitment Public Safety Announcement Campaign')

concerns.description: Minor text differences beyond acceptable reformatting
concerns.analysis: A text discrepancy was found in the 'Networks' list within the Durham Zone section (corresponding to page 8). The source document lists 'NICK' between 'NATG' and 'OUTD'. The output omits 'NICK' and instead repeats 'NATG', resulting in 'NATG, NATG, OUTD'. This is an error in transcription that alters the list of networks reported.
concerns.source_pdf_quote: Networks list on page 8: "...NFL, NATG, NICK, OUTD..."
concerns.output_quote: Networks paragraph in Section 5 (reading_order 51): "...NFL, NATG, NATG, OUTD..."
